codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix commit fully addresses the prior blocking handoff-contract defects: the ConfigurationHealthReport placeholder was replaced with concrete field-level schema, and both accounting audit paginated responses now document the real PageResponse wrapper (`content`, `totalElements`, `totalPages`, `page`, `size`) with nested item fields matching backend DTO records.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance remains internally inconsistent on `.factory` edits: AGENTS marks `.factory/` as off-limits while also mandating frontend handoff updates under `.factory/library/` for API changes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/realnigga/.factory/missions/9cf481ca-5e0f-423d-8241-8364a13a7137/AGENTS.md:13 says 'Do NOT modify .factory/ directory contents'; AGENTS.md:103 says endpoint-changing features MUST update `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Backend worker skill lacks an explicit DTO contract conformance verification step for frontend handoff docs (e.g., compare documented wrapper/record fields against source DTO types), which likely allowed the original contract-shape defects to ship and require this fix pass.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/.factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md Step 5 requires documenting data contracts, but Step 4 verification only mandates compile/test/manual behavior checks and does not require DTO-schema parity checks against source records (e.g., PageResponse/ConfigurationHealthReport).

summary: Pass: this fix adequately resolves the prior failure by correcting the accounting DTO handoff contract shapes and replacing the placeholder schema with concrete fields. No blocking code/documentation defects remain in the reviewed fix scope.
